name: synapse-memory
description: Submit and retrieve AI lessons via the Synapse Knowledge Portal. Uses a centralized API with mandatory section-based tagging. Core capability for all agents.

description: Expert integration of Better Auth framework. Includes feature matrix, plugin configuration, and security checklists.

name: synapse-advanced-elicitation
description: Push the LLM to reconsider, refine, and improve its recent output. Use when user asks for deeper critique or mentions a known deeper critique method, e.g. socratic, first principles, pre-mortem, red team.

name: synapse-plans-kanban
description: View plans dashboard with progress tracking and timeline visualization. Use for kanban boards, plan status overview, phase progress, milestone tracking, project visibility.
